summary: Built an /app-roadmap skill that acts as a senior engineer advisor — analyzes app ideas and generates an interactive build roadmap with phases, tasks, tech stack recommendations, and security checklist for non-technical designers

Created Mission Control — a Next.js dashboard at ~/Apps/mission-control that reads Claude Code data (MCP servers, skills, projects, session log) and displays it as a live dark-themed command center with auto-refresh
Simplified the Mission Control session log to use Claude-written plain-English summaries instead of auto-extracted transcript data, and updated the Next.js UI to match

Initial sync — seeding hosted Mission Control dashboard with current session history, MCP servers, skills, and projects
Built and deployed Mission Control project status card view with End Mission flow, replacing the session log with per-project status cards sorted by recency
